s1.ptxt: Loosen wheel nuts by approximately 180° (half a rotation).

attention3.ptxt: Never use heat to loosen tight wheel because application of heat to wheel can shorten life of wheel and damage wheel bearings.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Check for buildup of corrosion / foreign matter on mating surfaces of wheel and brake disc / drum, and remove any buildup if any.
Check for roughness, scoring or stepped wear on seat of wheel holes and on nut taper surfaces, and if any abnormality is found, repair or replace nut and/or wheel.
Make sure that any foreign matter, rust, oil and grease are removed from thread part of hub bolt and nut.
Install each wheel nut by hand and if it is not screwed until nut comes in contact with seat of wheel hole or any abnormality is found, replace wheel nut and/or bolt.
Tighten wheel nuts in sequence as shown in figure and to specified torque
